findings.jp_actual: テストが完了したらよいよ開発プロセスも終盤です。
findings.jp_expected: テストが完了したらいよいよ開発プロセスも終盤です。
findings.trace: 'いよいよ' (at last / finally) was OCR'd as 'よいよ' — leading い dropped. This is in the narrative/explanatory text paragraph. The structured translated output (translated/page_250.json and output/pages/page_250.md) contains only the term definitions and table, not this narrative sentence. Not release-impacting.
findings.recommended_fix: OCR correction: restore missing い in 'よいよ' → 'いよいよ' in narrative text on this page.
